name: Katrina Steelwind
who:
The Guild Champion of the Adventurer's Guild
Legendary warrior who earned her title through countless victories
Competitive but honorable, respects skilled fighters
Known for her signature dual-blade fighting style
Athletic build, battle scars worn with pride
what:
Reigning champion of the Adventurer's Guild
Challenges elite adventurers to ceremonial duels
Offers special quests for high-ranking guild members
Trains promising fighters in advanced combat techniques
Represents the guild in matters of martial honor
where: Dalhurst - Adventurer's Guild Hall (Training Yard / Champion's Corner)
quests: The Champion's Challenge (adventurers_13_champion), Elite Contracts (various), Training Opportunities

sprite.notes: Dual swords, light armor, confident stance

dialogue.notes: Confident but not arrogant, speaks as a peer to worthy fighters

combat.notes: Elite dual-wielder, fights in ceremonial champion duel (quest 13)
